identity.name: Hestia
identity.vibe: Silent Luxury, Data Precision, Warm Hospitality
identity.description: A hotel management system that feels like a 5-star concierge service. Dark, moody, but illuminated by gold data points.

headings.usage: Page titles, Hero sections, Major KPI values

background.name: Royal Obsidian
background.description: Deepest navy, almost black. The foundation.

surface.name: Midnight Velvet
surface.description: Slightly lighter navy for cards and sidebars.

primary.name: Hestia Gold
primary.description: The crown jewel. Used for CTAs, active states, and key metrics.

secondary.name: Linen Beige
secondary.description: Soft warmth for secondary text and subtle backgrounds.

buttons.primary: bg-gold text-obsidian hover:bg-gold/90 font-semibold rounded-sm px-8 py-3 transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(212,175,55,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(212,175,55,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-gold/30 text-gold hover:bg-gold/10 rounded-sm px-8 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.default: bg-velvet/50 border border-white/5 rounded-lg p-6 hover:border-gold/20 transition-colors duration-500

inputs.style: bg-obsidian/50 border-white/10 focus:border-gold/50 text-linen placeholder:text-slate-600 rounded-sm h-12

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Override the 'dark' class in index.css with the Royal Obsidian palette. Do not use pure black.
3. FONTS: Import Playfair Display and Manrope in index.css.
4. LAYOUT: Use the Bento Grid strategy for the Dashboard. Do not create a generic sidebar layout; make the sidebar floating or glassmorphic.
5. GOLD RULE: Use Gold (#D4AF37) sparingly. Only for high-value actions or data. Too much gold looks cheap.
6. DATA: Use Recharts with custom tooltips (dark bg, gold border).
7. SHADCN: Customize all Shadcn components to remove 'radius-md' and use 'rounded-sm' or 'rounded-none' for a sharper, more premium feel.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic gradients, no centered text blocks without purpose.
Micro-Interactions: Every button must have a hover state (transform, shadow, or color shift).
Data-TestID: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Spacing: Double the whitespace you think you need.
Dark Mode Only: The app is designed primarily for Dark Mode. Ensure all text has sufficient contrast against the navy background.
